bank-atm-simulation.overview:
Menu-driven ATM simulation using switch, methods, and loops.

Features to build:
• Deposit
• Withdraw
• Balance Enquiry
• Exit

Requirements:
• Use switch for menu
• Use methods for each operation
• Use loops for continuous operation

Bonus:
• Transaction history
• PIN validation
bank-atm-simulation.explanation: Uses a while loop for the ATM menu and switch for deposit, withdraw, and balance check. A double balance variable holds the account state. Withdraw validates sufficient funds.

student-result-system.overview:
Calculate student results with grades and pass/fail status.

Features to build:
• Enter Marks
• Calculate Total
• Percentage
• Grade
• Pass/Fail

Requirements:
• Use if-else for grading
• Use methods for calculations

Bonus:
• Multiple students
• Subject-wise breakdown
student-result-system.explanation: Student Result System is a console Java program implementing: Enter Marks, Calculate Total, Percentage, Grade, Pass/Fail. Use Scanner, loops, and conditionals. Build one feature at a time and test each step.
student-result-system.sampleOutput:
Student Result System
Calculate student results with grades and pass/fail status.

number-utility-app.overview:
Utility app for common number operations.

Features to build:
• Reverse Number
• Palindrome
• Armstrong
• Prime
• Factorial

Requirements:
• Use methods for each utility
• Use loops where needed

Bonus:
• Menu-driven interface
number-utility-app.explanation: Number Utility Application is a console Java program implementing: Reverse Number, Palindrome, Armstrong, Prime, Factorial. Use Scanner, loops, and conditionals. Build one feature at a time and test each step.
number-utility-app.sampleOutput:
Number Utility Application
Utility app for common number operations.

restaurant-billing.overview:
Restaurant order and billing system with discount and GST.

Features to build:
• Menu
• Quantity
• Bill
• Discount
• GST

Requirements:
• Use switch for menu selection
• Use loops for multiple items
• Use methods for bill calculation

Bonus:
• Print formatted receipt
restaurant-billing.explanation: Restaurant Billing System is a console Java program implementing: Menu, Quantity, Bill, Discount, GST. Use Scanner, loops, and conditionals. Build one feature at a time and test each step.
restaurant-billing.sampleOutput:
Restaurant Billing System
Restaurant order and billing system with discount and GST.

pattern-generator.overview:
Menu-driven pattern generator for star and number patterns.

Features to build:
• Menu Driven
• Different Star Patterns
• Number Patterns

Requirements:
• Menu-driven pattern selection
• Implement at least 3 patterns

Bonus:
• Character patterns
• Custom size input
pattern-generator.explanation: Nested for loops print rows and columns of stars. The outer loop controls rows; the inner loop prints stars per row. Classic pattern practice for loops.
